Event: The New Fairy Adventure
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E23
Special Knowledge Engraving

Enhancement: 1
The unit's outgoing healing is increased by 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 24% / 30% / 38% for the duration of the battle. Once in a while, the unit restores 58400 / 61700 / 66000 / 71900 / 81200 / 100000 / 130000 health to an ally with the lowest health.

Enhancement: 2
2000 Magic damage from the gems
The unit's outgoing healing is increased by 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 24% / 30% / 38% for the duration of the battle. Once in a while, the ally with the lowest current health gains restoration. It removes a random debuff and restores 73000 / 77100 / 82500 / 89900 / 101500 / 125000 / 160000 health. Additionally, their damage increases by 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 24% / 30% / 38% and health by 10% / 12% / 14% / 16% / 18% / 20% / 24% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
4000 Magic damage from the gems
The unit's outgoing healing is increased by 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 24% / 30% / 38% for the duration of the battle. Once in a while, the ally with the lowest current health gains restoration. It removes a random debuff and restores 73000 / 77100 / 82500 / 89900 / 101500 / 125000 / 160000 health. Additionally, their damage increases by 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 24% / 30% / 38% and health by 10% / 12% / 14% / 16% / 18% / 20% / 24% for 3 sec. Once in a while, restores 58400 / 61700 / 66000 / 71900 / 81200 / 100000 / 130000 health to themself and all allies.
